description: Letter sent from Gaza to Fustat. In Judaeo-Arabic.The sender heard a report that somebody "is praying in Qalyūb," maybe meaning that he is serving as muqaddam. He thanked God for "the establishing of your reputation (qiyām jāhika)." T-S AS 160.400 (PGPID 18809) and T-S 12.407 (PGPID 19964) appear to be in the same hand and may join indirectly.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מ-Gaza לפוסטאט. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
